'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 32''' was the thirty-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 7]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Encounter at [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*Podrace Mechanics
*[[The Force/Legends|The Force]]
*[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty Hunters]] - [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - Palpatine's Apartments
*Droid Manufacturers
*[[1.4 FD P-Tower/Legends|Atgar 1.4 FD P-Tower Laser Cannon]]
*[[Storm IV Twin-Pod cloud car/Legends|Storm IV Twin-Pod Cloud Car]]
